faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDesc: Salary Thief FAQ: Is it free? Will my boss know? Which currencies and languages are supported?

items.a: Yes! All basic features are free including the timer, daily stats, and achievement system. Some advanced features like yearly review can be unlocked by watching ads.
Absolutely not. All data stays on your device — no uploads, no sync, no tracking. No account needed. Your slacking secrets are safe.

items.q: What currencies and languages are supported?
items.a: 5 currencies: TWD, USD, JPY, KRW, CNY. 5 languages: Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean.

items.q: What if I forget to start the timer?
items.a: No worries! Use the Quick Log feature to manually add breaks with category, duration, and time of day.

brand.title: About Salary Thief
brand.story: Everyone needs a break at work. Salary Thief turns your downtime into a fun number game — no guilt, just good vibes and interesting stats.
brand.mission: We believe work isn't just about numbers, and rest is an art. Log your little wins and make your workday more fun.
brand.ctaSubtitle: Download Salary Thief and turn your breaks into achievements

footer.productDesc: Salary Thief — Slacking Timer for Office Workers

about.title: About Salary Thief
about.metaDesc: The story behind Salary Thief — the slacking timer app
story: Salary Thief was born from a simple idea: why does slacking off feel so good, yet nobody ever measures how good?
We're a team that believes 'rest is productivity.' Instead of feeling guilty about breaks, turn them into a fun game.
All data stays on your device. No accounts, no cloud, no tracking. Your slacking secrets are yours alone.

values.title: Privacy First
values.desc: No data collection, no server upload

values.title: Lighthearted
values.desc: A fun take on workday stress

content.heading: Data Collection & Storage
content.body: Salary Thief respects your privacy. We do not ourselves collect or upload your personal data—all slacking records, settings, and achievements are stored locally on your device. However, the third-party SDKs integrated into the app (see below) may collect device and anonymous usage data.

content.heading: Third-Party Services
content.body: The app uses Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics to analyze usage and report crashes, and Google AdMob to serve ads. These services may collect device identifiers, approximate location, and anonymous usage data. In-app purchases are processed by the Apple App Store or Google Play; we never have access to your payment information.

content.heading: Advertising & Tracking
content.body: The app contains Google AdMob ads. To serve personalized ads, AdMob may use your advertising identifier (IDFA on iOS or Advertising ID on Android). On iOS we request your consent via App Tracking Transparency (ATT); you can disable personalized ads or reset your advertising identifier at any time in your device settings.

content.heading: Children's Privacy
content.body: The app is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

content.heading: Data Security & Deletion
content.body: Because all user data stays on your device and is never transmitted through our servers, your slacking secrets enjoy a high level of security. Uninstalling the app deletes all related data from your device.

content.heading: Your Rights & Third-Party Policies
content.body: You can manage your ad preferences through your device settings. For how third parties handle data, please see the Google Privacy Policy (policies.google.com/privacy) and Google AdMob policies.

content.heading: Changes to This Policy
content.body: This policy may be updated from time to time, with the latest revision date shown on this page. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

content.heading: Contact Us
content.body: For any privacy-related questions, email srcchang@gmail.com.

content.heading: Acceptance
content.body: By downloading or using Salary Thief, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.

content.heading: Eligibility
content.body: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age required by the laws of your region) to use the app; if you are below that age, you may use it only with the consent and supervision of a parent or guardian.

content.heading: License
content.body: We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable, limited license to use the app on iOS or Android devices that you own or control.

content.heading: Purchases
content.body: The app offers in-app purchases (such as ad removal, feature unlocks, or subscriptions). All payments, billing, and refunds are handled by the Apple App Store or Google Play under their respective policies; refund requests must be made through the relevant platform, as we cannot process them directly.

content.heading: Disclaimer
content.body: The app is provided for entertainment purposes on an "as is" basis, without warranties of any kind, express or implied. All calculations are for reference only and do not constitute financial, tax, or legal advice. To the maximum extent permitted by law, the developer is not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from use of the app.

content.heading: Intellectual Property
content.body: The app and all content, trademarks, and designs are owned by SRC and may not be copied, modified, or distributed without authorization.

content.heading: App Store Terms
content.body: Downloading and using the app through the Apple App Store or Google Play is also subject to the terms of each platform. For the iOS version, Apple is not a party to these Terms but is a third-party beneficiary and may enforce them against you.

content.heading: Service Changes
content.body: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the service at any time without notice.

content.heading: Governing Law
content.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Taiwan (R.O.C.), and any disputes shall be subject to the Taiwan Taipei District Court as the court of first instance.

content.heading: Contact Us
content.body: For any questions about these Terms, email srcchang@gmail.com.
